cycle_reasoning: The company is currently facing critical build failures (#509) and significant TypeScript errors (#510) in the Grammar and Vocabulary modules. The CTO has a backlog of 6 issues, which exceeds the cap of 3, so no new issues will be created this cycle. The immediate priority is to restore the build to a working state and resolve the P0/P1 type errors. QA is assigned to verify these critical fixes, and Product is assigned to ensure the roadmap remains aligned as we move toward the Supabase migration (#496).
